items.name: badge
items.title: BTBadge
items.description: Status label pill. Communicates the state or category of an entity (approved, pending, draft, etc.) via a colored pill with optional left/right icon.

items.name: button
items.title: BTButton
items.description: Interactive action button with 5 variants and 2 sizes. Supports left/right icon slots and icon-only mode.

items.name: button-link
items.title: BTButtonLink
items.description: Inline hyperlink-style action atom. Renders a text label with optional leading/trailing 16px icons. Hover shows underline + bold weight. Press dims to a neutral colour. Disabled greys out with text.disabled.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: BTCheckbox
items.description: Checkbox atom with 7 states: uncheck, check, indeterminate, disable-uncheck, disable-check, disable-indeterminate, and error. Supports optional label and subtext. The widget is stateless — callers own checked/indeterminate values.

items.name: separator
items.title: BTSeparator
items.description: A 1px visual divider line. Renders horizontal (full-width) or vertical (full-height) using the border.primary token.

items.name: slider
items.title: BTSlider
items.description: Interactive range slider atom. Supports three layout types (defaults, range, vertical) and three color variants (primary, secondary, destructive). Uses Flutter's native Slider/RangeSlider with SliderTheme overrides.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: BTTooltip
items.description: Hover / tap tooltip that wraps a trigger widget and displays a dark-background floating balloon with a rounded-tip arrow caret. Supports plain text or rich widget content via the content/children slot.

items.name: alert
items.title: BTAlert
items.description: Contextual feedback banner with icon, label, optional description, optional action button/link, and optional dismiss button.

items.name: avatar
items.title: BTAvatar
items.description: Circular badge displaying a user's profile image or auto-derived initials. Supports skeleton loading state. Used standalone or inside BTAvatarGroup (organism) for stacked group displays.

items.name: tabs
items.title: BTTabs
items.description: Tab strip molecule with two variants: segmented (pill tray) and line (underline). Controlled widget — caller manages activeIndex state. Supports optional leading/trailing icon builders per tab index.

items.name: tooltip-step
items.title: BTTooltipStep
items.description: Coachmark / onboarding step balloon with navigation buttons. Standalone and presentational — positioning relative to the target element is the caller's responsibility (Flutter: Positioned + Stack; web: absolute/fixed container).

items.name: avatar-group
items.title: BTAvatarGroup
items.description: Stacked group of BTAvatar widgets with horizontal negative-margin overlap. Renders a "+N" overflow counter when items exceed `max`. Stacking offsets match Figma 504:705 specs.
